description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'MiNiFi-CPP verify gcc13 compatibility' that runs on a workflow dispatch. In a single ubuntu-22.04 job with a 300-minute timeout, free disk space, check out the repository, install dependencies including gcc-13 and g++-13, build the project with cmake and make, run tests with a 300-second timeout, and upload core dumps and binaries as artifacts if tests fail and core dumps exist.
